7156.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
7156.description: Heidi Fleiss ran a prostitution ring in the 90's in LA. Her infamous red journal is known to reveal her many high-profile clients, including actors, musicians and politicians.

7157.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
7157.description: Jennifer Wilbanks was the subject of a media circus when she faked her own kidnapping and claimed she was sexually abused. Wilbanks eventually revealed why she abandoned her fiancé 4 days before their wedding.

7158.title: Judge Judy
7158.description: A woman is accused of selling belongings without permission, and ex-flatmates sue each other for unpaid rent and missing property.

7159.title: Cheaters
7159.description: The Cheaters team goes undercover to find out whether Eric is cheating on girlfriend Paige. Caught with his trousers down on camera, Eric is sent packing by a furious Paige.

7160.title: Cheaters
7160.description: Pablo's wife has noticed he is turning his back on family life. Cheaters' undercover investigators discover he is acting unfaithfully.

7161.title: Celebrity Damage Control
7161.description: Tom Cruise's all-American persona takes a massive hit after the public learns of his love for Scientology, leaving fans to wonder if he's really the man they thought he was.

7162.title: Uncovering Melanie's Murderer
7162.description: A study in modern crime solving techniques, used in the search for the 1984 killer of teenage Melanie. It demonstrates how traditional investigative techniques are enhanced by DNA profiling. Including interviews with the original investigation team.

7163.title: Judge Judy
7163.description: Snow blower damage to a car is at the heart of a dispute between a man and the 13-year-old nephew of his domestic partner. A woman sues a fellow motorist for allegedly running into her car in a parking lot. He claims she opened her door into his car.

7164.title: Judge Judy
7164.description: Plaintiffs sue a former friend for crashing their truck. A man wants his aunt to repay loans for car payments, gas and Christmas decorations. A mother demands payback for saving her son and his fiancee from eviction by paying their rent.

7165.title: Judge Judy
7165.description: A young man's mother and estranged wife fight over his funeral and memorial expenses. Then, a woman wants her former friend to repay her for a loan.

7166.title: Judge Judy
7166.description: A nurse sues her husband's ex-wife for children's insurance premiums and harassment. Then, a woman accuses her former friend of causing a car accident.

7167.title: Judge Judy
7167.description: A young man says his ex lied to him about the paternity of her daughter. Then, a woman says a fellow partygoer repeatedly kicked her car.

7168.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
7168.description: The team works on the tricky retrieval of a catamaran smashed against some rocks in Funnel Bay, North Queensland.

7169.title: Evidence of Evil
7169.description: December 2000: 19-year-old Rachel Manning was murdered in Milton Keynes. Two men were wrongfully convicted, but new advances in forensics proved that evil always leaves a trace.

7170.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
7170.description: People share their experiences with destructive spirits. A young girl fears a poltergeist and a boy claims to be terrorised by a shadow man.

7171.title: Doctor in the House
7171.description: The doctor is called upon to get to the bottom of Ray's back pain. He's been suffering for decades even though he looks fit and runs his own gym.

7172.title: Auction Kings
7172.description: Buyers in the Atlanta area searching for those one-of-a-kind items - a vampire hunting kit, anyone? - know exactly where to go, but the quantity is always limited and the prices fluid. `Auction Kings' follows the action at Gallery 63, a storied auction house in Hotlanta with a reputation for selling both bizarre and high-end items. Its owner, Paul Brown, manages his feisty staff and mingles with his customers, bidders and buyers who come from all walks of life.

7173.title: Auction Kings
7173.description: Buyers in the Atlanta area searching for those one-of-a-kind items - a vampire hunting kit, anyone? - know exactly where to go, but the quantity is always limited and the prices fluid. `Auction Kings' follows the action at Gallery 63, a storied auction house in Hotlanta with a reputation for selling both bizarre and high-end items. Its owner, Paul Brown, manages his feisty staff and mingles with his customers, bidders and buyers who come from all walks of life.

7174.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
7174.description: The team works on the tricky retrieval of a catamaran smashed against some rocks in Funnel Bay, North Queensland.

7175.title: Celebrity Damage Control
7175.description: When allegations broke that TV chef Paula Deen had a history of using racial epithets, the controversy threatened to destroy her culinary empire.

7176.title: Judge Judy
7176.description: Ex-lovers feud over a loan to make home renovations. Family members fight over money and the unequal distribution of an inheritance.

7177.title: Judge Judy
7177.description: A former couple feud over loans, furniture and appliances. Ex-lovers fight over a loan and unauthorised credit-card charges.

7178.title: Judge Judy
7178.description: A young driver's passengers anger them, and a woman sues a former friend for the return of her investment in his business.

7179.title: Judge Judy
7179.description: A woman sues her newlywed daughter for wedding expenses. After a young man dies suddenly, his father and friends fight over his personal belongings.

7180.title: Judge Judy
7180.description: A man sues for defamation of character after a friend calls the police saying he stole her car. A woman sues her ex-boyfriend for repayment of loans.

7181.title: Judge Judy
7181.description: A mother of four says her daughter's ex-boyfriend got the teen evicted from student housing; preschool teachers fight over the balance on a vehicle.

7182.title: Operation Repo
7182.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7183.title: Operation Repo
7183.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7184.title: Operation Repo
7184.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7185.title: Operation Repo
7185.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7186.title: Evidence of Evil
7186.description: December 2000: 19-year-old Rachel Manning was murdered in Milton Keynes. Two men were wrongfully convicted, but new advances in forensics proved that evil always leaves a trace.

7187.title: Celebrity Damage Control
7187.description: When allegations broke that TV chef Paula Deen had a history of using racial epithets, the controversy threatened to destroy her culinary empire.

7188.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
7188.description: The team works on the tricky retrieval of a catamaran smashed against some rocks in Funnel Bay, North Queensland.

7189.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
7189.description: People share their experiences with destructive spirits. A young girl fears a poltergeist and a boy claims to be terrorised by a shadow man.

7190.title: Cheaters
7190.description: Delores is suspicious of her fiancé's changing behaviour. Cheaters' investigators are called in to confirm whether her man is a cheat. Hosted by Joey Greco.

7191.title: Cheaters
7191.description: With host Joey Greco. The Cheaters team is called in by Daisy, who is suspicious of her boyfriend Chris. Undercover surveillance confirms her worst fears.

7192.title: Crimes That Shook Australia
7192.description: In December 1987, Frank Vitkovic kills nine people in Melbourne's Australia Post headquarters. The day becomes a milestone along the road to stricter gun controls in Australia.

7193.title: Crimes That Shook Australia
7193.description: In the Belanglo State Forest, in November 2010, Matthew Milat kills a school friend in cold blood. In doing so, he satisfies his desire to follow in the footsteps of his notorious uncle, Ivan.
